zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont於1101年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾包德蒙特時，她的父親André de Baudemont56歲，母親Agnes26歲。她和Comte Gautier II de Brienne至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1170年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont于1101年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾包德蒙特时，她的父亲André de Baudemont56岁，母亲Agnes26岁。她和Comte Gautier II de Brienne至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1170年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont was born in 1101, in Baudemont, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, André de Baudemont, was 56 and her mother, Agnes, was 26. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Comte Gautier II de Brienne. She died in 1170, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont est née en 1101, à Baudemont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, André de Baudemont, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Comte Gautier II de Brienne. Elle est décédée en 1170, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont 1101 in Baudemont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater André de Baudemont 56 und ihre Mutter Agnes 26. Sie hatte mit Comte Gautier II de Brienne mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont è nata il nel 1101 nel Baudemont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, André de Baudemont, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Comte Gautier II de Brienne. Morì nel 1170, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.1133/1143: から1133年1月8日まで1144年1月7日

ja.lifeSummary: Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémontが1101年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアバウデモントで生まれた時，父André de Baudemontは56歳，母Agnesは26歳であった。彼女はComte Gautier II de Brienneとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1170年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont(이)가 1101년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 바데몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 André de Baudemont(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Comte Gautier II de Brienne(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont nasceu em 1101, em Baudemont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, André de Baudemont, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Comte Gautier II de Brienne. Ela faleceu em 1170, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont родилась в 1101 г. в местности баудемонт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени André de Baudemont было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Comte Gautier II de Brienne. Она умерла в 1170 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont nació en 1101, en Baudemont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, André de Baudemont, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Comte Gautier II de Brienne. Murió en 1170, a la edad de 69 años.
